name: Athens Country Club
description: Athens Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Athens, GA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Athens First United Methodist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Athens First United Methodist Church in Athens, GA! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Bishop Park Tennis Center
description: Come play pickleball at Bishop Park Tennis Center in Athens, GA! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts cannot be reserved.
open_play_schedule: Courts are shared with tennis so may or may not be available.

name: Heard Park (formerly East Athens Community Center and Park)
description: Heard Park (formerly East Athens Community Center and Park) is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Athens, GA. There are 7 wood and hard courts. 3 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Monday • Wednesday •Thursday **Geared toward beginners on Mondays** 8:30 AM – 11:30 AM

name: Pittard Park
description: Pittard Park is a place to play pickleball in Winterville, GA. There are 2 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Ramsey Student Center
description: Come play pickleball at Ramsey Student Center in Athens, GA! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and lights.

name: Satterfield Park
description: Come play pickleball at Satterfield Park in Athens, GA! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Southeast Clarke Park
description: Come play pickleball at Southeast Clarke Park in Athens, GA! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Thomas Lay Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Thomas Lay Community Center in Athens, GA! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Monday • Tuesday • Wednesday • Friday ​8:30 AM – 12:00 PM

name: UGA Intramural Courts
description: Come play pickleball at UGA Intramural Courts in Athens, GA! There are 16 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. You can reserve the courts. The courts are private.

name: United Team Sports
description: United Team Sports is a place to play pickleball in Athens, GA. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: YWCO
description: Come play pickleball at YWCO in Athens, GA! There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and water. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.
